heading: Auditing and accounting
label: 1928d Auditing and accounting
text: The certificate of the Chairman of the House delegation and the Senate delegation of the NATO Parliamentary Assembly shall on and after , be final and conclusive upon the accounting officers in the auditing of the accounts of the United States Group of the NATO Parliamentary Assembly.July 11, 1956
notes: CodificationThis section was not enacted as part of the Mutual Security Act of 1954 which comprises this chapter.

Amendments1999— substituted “NATO Parliamentary Assembly” for “North Atlantic Assembly” in two places.Pub. L. 106–1131967— substituted “North Atlantic Assembly” for “North Atlantic Treaty Parliamentary Conference” in two places.Pub. L. 90–137
